text:
Cypriot sailor Pavlos Kontides, with the support of his Super Grand sponsor Freedom24, is offering fans a unique opportunity to win a trip to the Paris 2024 Olympic Games.

Kontides, an accomplished sailor, is giving away two pairs of tickets to the Olympics, including flights and accommodation. Find more informationhere.

The winners will receive tickets to the sailing race on August 6 in Marseille, France.

How to Enter:

1. Follow@pavloskontidesand@freedom24euon Instagram.

2. Repost Kontides’ video to your Instagram story, tagging@pavloskontidesand@freedom24eu.

3.Like the postand tag at least two friends in the comments.

Participants must ensure their Instagram accounts are public during the contest to allow verification of entries.

The winners will be randomly selected and announced on Kontides’ Instagram page on July 25.

The winners will be contacted to arrange flights from Cyprus to Marseille (or a monetary equivalent), accommodation, and ticket delivery.

Kontides expressed excitement about the giveaway, stating, “Good luck and see you in France!“.
title: Cypriot sailor Pavlos Kontides offers chance to win trip to Paris 2024 Olympics |  Cyprus Mail
